creator: michael.hmich@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to martin from comment #25)
well, what can I say, it is like I said, here again

relevant fstab entries
/dev/ada0s1             /Linux_Mint     ext2fs  noauto  0       0
/dev/ada0s4             /Arch           ext2fs  noauto  0       0

mount /Arch
fstab: /etc/fstab:13: Inappropriate file type or format
fstab: /etc/fstab:14: Inappropriate file type or format
fstab: /etc/fstab:13: Inappropriate file type or format
fstab: /etc/fstab:14: Inappropriate file type or format
mount: /Arch: unknown special file or file system

it doesn't matter if I have ada0s4 or ada0p4, it also doesn't matter which line I try to mount, it also doesn't matter what extra options I add, the answer is always the same
